login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.accountDisabled: This account has been suspended. Please contact the administrator.

twoFactor.subtitle: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.promptTotpAndEmail: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or request an emailed code below.

twoFactor.promptEmailOnly: Enter the 6-digit code we emailed you.
twoFactor.recoveryPrompt: Enter one of your recovery codes.

twoFactor.emailCodeSent: If email is configured, a sign-in code is on its way. Enter it below.
twoFactor.emailCodeFailed: Could not send an email code. Try your authenticator or a recovery code.

forgotPassword.subtitle: Reset your password
forgotPassword.sentMessage: If an account exists for that email, we’ve sent a link to reset your password. Check your inbox — the link expires in 1 hour.
forgotPassword.description: Enter the email for your account and we’ll send you a link to choose a new password.

resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password
resetPassword.invalidReset: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one to continue.
resetPassword.failed: Could not reset your password. Please try again.

invite.invalidMessage: This invite link is invalid, expired, or has already been used. Ask your administrator for a fresh invite.
invite.subtitle: Set up your account
invite.emailHint: Set by your invite and can't be changed.
invite.usernameHint: 3–40 characters: letters, numbers, dot, dash or underscore.
invite.usernameTaken: That username is already taken — pick another.
invite.emailTaken: An account already exists for this email.
invite.invalidInvite: This invite link is no longer valid. Ask your admin for a new one.
invite.acceptFailed: Could not create your account. Please try again.

forcedPasswordChange.subtitle: Choose a new password
forcedPasswordChange.signedInAs: You're signed in as {{email}}. You need to set a new password before continuing.
forcedPasswordChange.infoNoUser: You need to set a new password before continuing.
forcedPasswordChange.mismatch: The new passwords do not match.
forcedPasswordChange.failed: Could not change your password. Please try again.

pin.heading: Enter your PIN
pin.promptWithUser: Welcome back, {{username}}. Enter your {{length}}-digit PIN to keep going.
pin.prompt: Enter your {{length}}-digit PIN to keep going.
pin.fallbackError: Too many incorrect PINs. Please sign in with your password.
pin.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
pin.verifyFailed: Could not verify your PIN. Please try again.

importsExports.description: Broker CSV imports (Trade Republic, George, …) and full account-data export.

connections.description: Google login and other third-party connections.

backups.description: Automatic backups to Google Drive and elsewhere.

notifications.title: Notifications

friendAccepted.label: Accepted friend requests
friendAccepted.description: When someone accepts your friend request.

tempPassword.description: When an admin issues you a temporary password.

empty.title: No notifications yet

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Your session, PIN, and two-factor options.

session.title: Session
session.info: Signed in since {{signedInAt}} — expires after 30 days of inactivity ({{expiresAt}}).

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.description: Every device currently signed in to your account. Log out any you don't recognise.
sessions.revokeOneError: Could not log out that device. Please try again.
sessions.revokeOthersError: Could not log out the other devices. Please try again.
sessions.confirmLogoutOthersOne: Log out all {{count}} other device? You'll stay signed in on this one.
sessions.confirmLogoutOthersOther: Log out all {{count}} other devices? You'll stay signed in on this one.

pin.genericError: Could not update your PIN. Please try again.
pin.windowError: Could not update the unlock window. Please try again.
pin.lockDescription: While you're actively using BetterTrack it stays unlocked — reloads and new tabs included. The PIN is asked again only after this long with no activity.
pin.disabledNotice: Your PIN has been turned off.
pin.title: PIN
pin.description: A 4-digit PIN re-confirms it's you after the app has been left idle. It's a privacy curtain on top of your session, not a second factor.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Add a second step at sign-in. Turn on either method — or both.

totp.cardDescription: Codes from Google Authenticator, 1Password, or any TOTP app.
totp.enrollError: Could not start enrollment. Please try again.
totp.scanInstructions: Scan this QR code with Google Authenticator (or any TOTP app), then enter the 6-digit code it shows.
totp.manualEntryToggle: Can’t scan? Enter this key manually
totp.confirmationCodeHint: Enter the current 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

email.cardDescription: A one-time code sent to your account email when you sign in.
email.confirmInstructions: We emailed a code to your address. Enter it to turn on email codes.
email.codeHint: Enter the 6-digit code we just sent you.

recoveryCodes.saveNotice: Save these recovery codes somewhere safe. Each one can be used once to sign in if you lose access to your authenticator or email — they won't be shown again.
recoveryCodes.regenerateError: Could not regenerate recovery codes. Please try again.
recoveryCodes.cardDescription: One-time codes to sign in if you lose access to your other factors.

api.title: API Access
api.introBefore: Personal API keys authenticate scripts and integrations as you, scoped to what they may read or change. Send a key as

portfolioWrite.label: Portfolio · write
portfolioWrite.description: Create/edit portfolios, transactions and cash movements.

workboardWrite.label: Workboard · write
workboardWrite.description: Edit watchlists, conglomerates and run backtests.

tokenModal.title: Your new API key
tokenModal.description: Copy it now — for your security, it won't be shown again.
tokenModal.storeWarning: Store this token somewhere safe. Anyone with it can use the “{{name}}” key with its scopes. You won't be able to see it again — revoke and create a new key if you lose it.

keys.createError: Could not create the key. Please try again.

empty.title: No API keys yet
empty.description: Create a key above to start using the API.

oauth.sectionDescription: Register a third-party app to request scoped, revocable access to BetterTrack accounts via OAuth 2.0 (authorization code + PKCE). Users approve it on a consent screen and never share their password.

empty.title: No OAuth apps yet
empty.description: Register an app above to integrate with the OAuth flow.

credentialsModal.title: Your new OAuth app
credentialsModal.descriptionSecret: Copy the client secret now — for your security, it won't be shown again.
credentialsModal.descriptionPublic: This is a public client — it holds no secret and must use PKCE.
credentialsModal.secretWarning: Store this secret somewhere safe. Anyone with it can act as the “{{name}}” app. You won't be able to see it again — delete this app and register a new one if you lose it.
credentialsModal.publicClientNotice: Public clients (mobile/SPA) authenticate with PKCE instead of a secret. Use the client ID above with a code challenge.

oauth.registerError: Could not register the app. Check the redirect URIs and try again.
oauth.redirectUriRequired: Add at least one redirect URI.
oauth.redirectUrisHintBefore: Where we send users after they approve. Use https, http loopback, or a custom-scheme deep link (e.g.
oauth.scopesHint: What the app may request on the consent screen, in the words users will see.
oauth.publicClientDescription: Mobile / SPA apps that can't keep a secret. Uses PKCE, no client secret is issued.

grants.sectionDescription: Third-party apps you've allowed to access your account. Revoking an app immediately kills its tokens — it must be re-authorized to regain access.

empty.title: No authorized apps
empty.description: Apps you approve on the OAuth consent screen appear here.

modeNotice.cash: Full requested window — {{entries}}: a late constituent’s share sits as uninvested cash (0 % return) until its listing day.
modeNotice.redistribute: Full requested window — {{entries}}: a late constituent’s share is split equally among the already-listed constituents, then rebalanced to the target weights on its listing day.
